'''zhafacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaatialaite|kaatialaite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaatialaite|kaatialaite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhafacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfæchæth|zhæfæchæth]] || [[word:zhæfæchæj|zhæfæchæj]] || [[word:zhæfæchæsh|zhæfæchæsh]] || [[word:zhæfæchæ|zhæfæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafafachath|zhafafachath]] || [[word:zhafafachaj|zhafafachaj]] || [[word:zhafafachash|zhafafachash]] || [[word:zhafafacha|zhafafacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafachath|zhafachath]] || [[word:zhafachaj|zhafachaj]] || [[word:zhafachash|zhafachash]] || [[word:zhafacha|zhafacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafafchafth|zhafafchafth]] || [[word:zhafafchafj|zhafafchafj]] || [[word:zhafafchafsh|zhafafchafsh]] || [[word:zhafafchaf|zhafafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafachatha|zhafachatha]] || [[word:zhafachaja|zhafachaja]] || [[word:zhafachasha|zhafachasha]] || [[word:zhafachaka|zhafachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafachath|zhafachath]] || [[word:zhafachaj|zhafachaj]] || [[word:zhafachash|zhafachash]] || [[word:zhafacha|zhafacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafachathal|zhafachathal]] || [[word:zhafachajal|zhafachajal]] || [[word:zhafachashal|zhafachashal]] || [[word:zhafachakal|zhafachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafachaathatha|zhafachaathatha]] || [[word:zhafachaajaja|zhafachaajaja]] || [[word:zhafachaashasha|zhafachaashasha]] || [[word:zhafachaaka|zhafachaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafachathan|zhafachathan]] || [[word:zhafachajan|zhafachajan]] || [[word:zhafachashan|zhafachashan]] || [[word:zhafachakan|zhafachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafachathaoro|zhafachathaoro]] || [[word:zhafachajaoro|zhafachajaoro]] || [[word:zhafachashaoro|zhafachashaoro]] || [[word:zhafachakaoro|zhafachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
